message:
fix: restore WithAutoCommit in hookBeadWithRetry

PR #2648 removed .WithAutoCommit() from the bd update call in
hookBeadWithRetry without explanation. Without auto-commit, the hook
status write may not be visible to concurrent readers (witness, other
agents) until the next Dolt commit cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
